name: Cheesy Beef Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat the oven to 375°F.
2. Brown the ground beef in a medium skillet, then drain off the drippings. Add the garlic and cook until tender.
3. Combine the egg, horseradish, thyme, salt, and white pepper in a medium bowl, then add the meat mixture and mix well.
4. Roll out one pastry sheet to a 13-inch by 9-inch rectangle, then cut it in half lengthwise. Spread half of the meat mixture over each half, then sprinkle half a cup of shredded cheese on top.
5. Roll (jelly roll style) from one long side, then cut into 1-inch pieces, and place seam side down on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Repeat steps 3-5 with the remaining meat mixture and pastry.
7. Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown and serve warm.
